name: git
title: Jump to a GitHub repo you have access to
description: Jump to a GitHub repo you have access to
author: PanosSynetos

commands.name: git
commands.title: Git Jump
commands.description: Jump to any GitHub repo you have access to

preferences.name: githubOrgs
preferences.title: github.com Orgs (comma separated)
preferences.description: Organizations on github.com to fetch repos from (e.g. "woocommerce, Automattic").

preferences.name: githubUsers
preferences.title: github.com Users (comma separated)
preferences.description: User accounts on github.com whose repos to list (e.g. "WordPress, johnsmith").

preferences.name: enterpriseOrgs
preferences.title: Enterprise Orgs (comma separated)
preferences.description: Organizations on GitHub Enterprise to fetch repos from.

preferences.name: enterpriseHttpProxy
preferences.title: Enterprise HTTP Proxy
preferences.description: Optional HTTP_PROXY used when fetching from the Enterprise host

preferences.name: enterpriseHttpsProxy
preferences.title: Enterprise HTTPS Proxy
preferences.description: Optional HTTPS_PROXY used when fetching from the Enterprise host

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npx @raycast/api@latest publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
